# Primary vs Secondary Rules

## Dominance
- `primary` is the dominant action color.
- `secondary` is only support/surface color.

## Use Primary For
- Main CTA buttons.
- Active selected states.
- Important progress/focus indicators.

## Use Secondary For
- Secondary buttons.
- Alternate panels and card backgrounds.
- Supportive UI containers.

## Neutral Layering
- Keep readable text in `foreground` or theme-adjusted contrast values.
- Do not swap primary/secondary roles per component.
